package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for external_http_call_inside_transaction_scope: Network calls performed while a DB transaction is open.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule032NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule032NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule032NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario032Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule032NegativeService, input Rule032NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
